channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: US-Mexico Border Wall Construction Impacts Sacred Indigenous Sites
item.description: Indigenous leaders from the Kumeyaay Nation and Tohono O’odham Nation have raised concerns about ongoing construction of the US-Mexico border wall, asserting that sacred sites and cultural heritage ar...

item.title: WHO declares Ebola outbreak in DRC and Uganda a public health emergency
item.description: The World Health Organisation (WHO) has declared an Ebola outbreak affecting the Democratic Republic of the Congo (DRC) and Uganda a public health emergency of international concern. The outbreak is c...

item.title: Federal Reserve Chair Kevin Warsh Plans to Reduce Balance Sheet, Implications for Investors
item.description: Kevin Warsh has assumed the role of Federal Reserve chair, succeeding Jerome Powell, and he intends to significantly shrink the Fed's $6.7 trillion balance sheet. This is a major departure from the pa...

item.title: Ontario advances Barrie-Sudbury power line amid environmental concerns
item.description: Ontario is moving forward with plans to fast-track the construction of a 500-kilovolt transmission line between Barrie and Sudbury, expected to be operational by 2032. The province says the project wi...

item.title: Emfuleni faces persistent challenges in waste collection and illegal dumping
item.description: Communities in parts of Vanderbijlpark, Sharpeville, Boipatong, and Sebokeng in the Vaal are facing a severe waste management crisis, with uncollected rubbish piling up on streets and turning some are...

item.title: APC Ekiti North Federal Constituency Primary Declared Inconclusive Over Irregularities and Crisis
item.description: The All Progressives Congress (APC) Primary Election Committee for Ekiti State has declared the House of Representatives primary in Ekiti North Federal Constituency 1 inconclusive. This one involve th...

item.title: Nigeria Customs Seize Cocaine Worth N2.35bn, 15 Trailers of Imported Rice and Other Contraband
item.description: The Nigeria Customs Service (NCS), Federal Operations Unit Zone ‘A’, Ikeja, don seize cocaine valued at N2.35 billion along with 15 trailers of imported rice, plus plenty other contraband across South...

item.title: Yobe Police Nab Six Suspects Over Currency Fraud
item.description: The Yobe State Police Command don successfully arrest six people wey dem suspect say dey involved in currency counterfeiting across different parts of the state. The arrests na part of the ongoing eff...

item.title: Yvonne Okwara: Profile of Citizen TV's Senior News Anchor, Her Luhya-Teso Roots, Career and Personal Life
item.description: Yvonne Okwara Buliba Matole is one of Kenya's most respected television journalists, currently working as a Senior News Anchor and Editor at Citizen TV under Royal Media Services. Born on 16 March 198...

item.title: WHO Declares Bundibugyo Ebola Outbreak in Congo and Uganda a Global Health Emergency
item.description: The World Health Organization (WHO) has declared a public health emergency of international concern due to an outbreak of the rare Bundibugyo ebolavirus in the Democratic Republic of Congo and Uganda....

item.title: Gauteng schools face R584 million municipal debt affecting water and electricity services
item.description: Gauteng’s education sector is grappling with a serious financial and operational challenge, as schools owe municipalities nearly R584 million in unpaid bills over 60 days old. The City of Johannesburg...

item.title: Bungoma Woman Stuck in India After Liver Transplant Funds Fall Short
item.description: Kate Nabutola, a Bungoma County employee and single mother, is stranded in India after her planned liver transplant could not proceed due to insufficient funds. Kenyan donors had helped fund her journ...

item.title: Dangote Group and Norwegian Sovereign Wealth Fund Discuss Investments in Power, Energy and Agriculture Across Africa
item.description: Chief Executive of Dangote Group, Aliko Dangote, recently meet with Nicolai Tangen, the CEO of Norges Bank Investment Management, which manage the world largest sovereign wealth fund with about $1.9 t...

item.title: Adam Driver declines to comment on Lena Dunham's on-set behaviour claims during Cannes press conference
item.description: At a press conference in Cannes for his new film Paper Tiger, actor Adam Driver avoided addressing allegations made by his former Girls co-star Lena Dunham in her recent memoir Famesick. Dunham, who c...

item.title: French authorities report additional suspected victims in Epstein human trafficking investigation
item.description: French authorities have revealed that approximately ten new suspected victims have come forward in connection with the human trafficking network of the late U.S. financier Jeffrey Epstein. The announc...

item.title: 90s rave-themed World Cup watch parties announced for London venues this summer
item.description: Promoter Kick Off Club has announced a series of 90s rave-themed screenings for the 2026 World Cup in London, offering football fans an alternative to watching the late-night matches at home. The tour...

item.title: Remembering Tatiana Samoilova, Icon of Soviet Cinema
item.description: Tatiana Samoilova was a defining figure in Soviet cinema, celebrated for her emotionally rich performances and timeless beauty. Rising to international fame with her role in the 1957 classic 'The Cran...

item.title: Kyle Schwarber Hits 20 Home Runs Early in 2026, Showing Historic Power
item.description: Philadelphia Phillies slugger Kyle Schwarber is off to a historic start in the 2026 MLB season. Through his first 46 games, Schwarber has already hit 20 home runs, putting him on pace for an unprecede...

item.title: Capetonians and South Africans rally behind 19-year-old Creashy Maart in her battle with terminal cancer
item.description: Nineteen-year-old Creashy Maart from Mitchells Plain in Cape Town has captured the hearts of South Africans after receiving a terminal cancer diagnosis. Diagnosed with lung problems as a tiny baby, sh...

item.title: Australian startup founders respond to proposed capital gains tax changes with AI images
item.description: Several Australian tech founders have responded to the federal government's proposed changes to the capital gains tax (CGT) by posting AI-generated images of Prime Minister Anthony Albanese in their w...
